# Well-Known Folder Identifiers

**API Collection**

Identifiers for well-known media folders used to specify the value for [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadFoldersKey].

## Constants

- **MLMediaLoadAppleLoops**: Identifies the folder containing audio loops from Apple.
- **MLMediaLoadMoviesFolder**: Identifies the user’s Movies folder.

## Constants

- **Load Options Keys**: Keys used to specify the `options` dictionary argument to [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLibrary/init(options:)].
- **Media Source Identifiers**: Identifiers for media sources which correspond to apps used to manage groups of media objects. Used with [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/load-options-keys].
- **Non-App-Specific Media Source Identifiers**: Identifiers for media sources which do not correspond to apps. Used with [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/load-options-keys].
